ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the airline (e.g., ARG, LKE) */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "operating_status" TEXT /* Current operating status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the airport (e.g., SAEZ, UUEE) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "callsign" TEXT /* Callsign of the flight (e.g., ARG1050) */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, in-flight, landed, canceled) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the departure airport */,
  "check_in_counter" TEXT /* Check-in counter number at the departure airport */,
  "baggage_claim" TEXT /* Baggage claim number at the arrival airport */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "flight_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft (e.g., Boeing 737) */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline owning the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturing_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "seat_capacity" INTEGER /* Total seat capacity of the aircraft */,
  "fuel_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel capacity of the aircraft in liters */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., due, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., pilot, flight attendant) */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline employing the crew member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the crew member */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the crew member's license */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on-leave, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_crew" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the flight */,
  "duty_start_time" TEXT /* Time the crew member starts their duty */,
  "duty_end_time" TEXT /* Time the crew member ends their duty */,
  "duty_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the crew member's duty in minutes */,
  "flight_hours" INTEGER /* Total flight hours for the crew member in the current duty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircraft" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "takeoff_weight" INTEGER /* Takeoff weight of the aircraft for the flight */,
  "landing_weight" INTEGER /* Landing weight of the aircraft for the flight */,
  "fuel_used" INTEGER /* Amount of fuel used during the flight in liters */,
  "maintenance_check" TEXT /* Whether a maintenance check is required after the flight (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id", "aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the passenger is booked on */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "boarding_status" TEXT /* Boarding status of the passenger (e.g., checked-in, boarded, not-boarding) */,
  "baggage_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the checked baggage in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_history" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes (if any) */,
  "flight_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in kilometers */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "fuel_consumption" INTEGER /* Fuel consumption for the flight in liters */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Total weight of cargo on the flight in kilograms */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight (e.g., clear, rain, storm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)
